case_title: STANLEY LUONG VS. ALLSTATE NORTHBROOK INDEMNITY COMPANY

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) BILL LEE, CLAIMS ADJUSTER. FILED BY PLAINTIFF LUONG, STANLEY
ADDED TO EXHIBIT DESTRUCTION REPORT OF NOV-01-2019
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) BILL LEE, CLAIMS ADJUSTER FILED BY DEFENDANT ALLSTATE NORTHBROOK INDEMNITY COMPANY
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-04-2019 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LUONG, STANLEY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ALLSTATE NORTHBROOK INDEMNITY COMPANY $1,888.00 PRINCIPAL, $45.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,933.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
EXHIBITS RETURNED TO PLAINTIFF LUONG, STANLEY ADDITIONAL DEFENDANT EXHIBITS
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,406.91 FILED BY LUONG, STANLEY AS TO DEFENDANT ALLSTATE NORTHBROOK INDEMNITY COMPANY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-23-2019 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED NOV-01-2019 ORDERED DESTROYED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (AGENT FOR SERVICE OF PROCESS: CT CORP.) SERVED JUL-12-2019, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT ALLSTATE NORTHBROOK INDEMNITY COMPANY
ORDER RE: CONTINUANCE TO ALLOW FOR CANTONESE INTERPERTER. MATTER CONTINUED TO SEPTEMBER 4, 2019 AT 8:30 P.M. DEPT. 506 (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-23-2019 - CONTINUED FOR CANTONESE INTERPRETER TO SEP-04-2019 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF STANLEY WONG IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT ALLSTATE NORTHBROOK INDEMNITY COMPANY, REPRESENTED BY BILL LEE, CLAIMS ADJUSTER IS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF SEP-04-2019 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF SEP-04-2019 BY A. JAMES ROBERTSON II. PLAINTIFF STANLEY LUONG, REPRESENTED BY CONNIE CHEN, COURT CERTIFIED INTERPERTER IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT ALLSTATE NORTHBROOK INDEMNITY COMPANY, REPRESENTED BY BILL LEE CLAIMS ADJUSTER IS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)
